t_ch: 他们都是被你附身之后强行带回来的，不是吗？哪里是回来了……
t_en: They're only here because you possessed them and made them come back. This isn't what I meant...

t_ch: 哎哟我去，你就说回没回来吧？！
t_en: Oh c'mon! You wanted them to return — they returned!

t_ch: 尾巴，你不是我的幻觉啊…你是真正的尾巴！你是真的尾巴！你回来了！
t_en: Tail... you're not an illusion... You're here! You're actually Tail!

t_ch: 这些日子你都跑哪去了，我还以为你…以为你已经……
t_en: Where have you been all this time? I thought you were already...

t_ch: 已经死了？老子过得也不轻松呀，被炸成了无数小碎片，老费力地又融在一起了…老子跟着你倒了这么多年的霉，总该得有些好运气吧！
t_en: ...Dead? Well, I haven't exactly had a picnic — exploding into countless shards, being your shadow for all those rotten years — it's about time I had some good luck!

t_ch: 老子原本是打算跑路的，但是，这不是不放心你嘛，特意来确认一下，你这个怂包到底能不能行，有没有长进？
t_en: I thought about getting out of here, but I couldn't shake the feeling there was something wrong... so I came back to see if you could manage on your own, or if you were still a scaredy-cat.

t_ch: 不好意思，藿藿毫无长进。
t_en: I'm sorry... I guess I still am...

t_ch: 不，你也太小看自己了，你那何止是长进啊，你简直是胆大包天！一个人就敢来做这么危险的事？我怀疑你不是没有勇气，你只是没脑子！
t_en: No, you're selling yourself short! You're daring! How you had the courage to do something so dangerous amazes me! It's not bravery you lack, but sense!

t_ch: …那、那我能怎么办嘛，我也觉得浮烟在骗我，但要是错过就找不到了怎么办？
t_en: ...What other choice did I have? I suspected that Cirrus was deceiving me, but the thought of losing you forever was... unbearable.

t_ch: 这事就别提了。嘿，藿藿，真的是因为老子的关系，这些人都离开了你吗？
t_en: Forget about all that, I'm here now. But... did everyone really leave you because of me?

t_ch: 离开就离开吧。
t_en: They left, let them be.

t_ch: …离开就离开吧。我本来也不擅长和人相处，就算没有尾巴，他们也会离开的。
t_en: You know what? They left, let them be. I'm not a people person anyway. Without you, Tail, they'd have left me just the same...

t_ch: 至少现在，你回来了不是吗？
t_en: But at least you're back now, right?

t_ch: 至少现在，有尾巴愿意为我回来，我很满足了。
t_en: ...but you came back for me... and that's all I need.

t_ch: 既然你都这么说了，本大爷可不会愧疚的哦。
t_en: Well, since you put it like that, I suppose I have nothing to feel guilty about anymore!

t_ch: 哎，我还是得盯着你，免得你又惹出什么大乱子！对了，眼前还有件麻烦事——藏起来的岁阳，立刻给老子滚出来！
t_en: ...Somebody needs to keep you out of trouble! Speaking of which, there's a pesky heliobus lurking right here. I'm coming for you!

t_ch: 别想跑！
t_en: Don't even think about escaping!

t_ch: 这里是哪里呀…尾巴，尾巴，你在这里吗？
t_en: Where... where am I? T—Tail, are you here?

t_ch: …我、我被谁附身了吗？是尾巴吗？
t_en: I... I feel like I've been possessed. Tail, is that you?

t_ch: …肯定不是尾巴。那家伙傲气得很，按它的说法，很少有人配让它寄宿。
t_en: ...No, it can't be him. Tail always said only the most privileged are worthy of being his host.

t_ch: …别胡思乱想了，现在该怎么办？
t_en: ...Stop overthinking, Huohuo. What should I do now?

t_ch: 我该怎么办……
t_en: What should I do?

t_ch: 尾巴……
t_en: Tail...

t_ch: 附身
t_en: (Possess)

t_ch: 把这家伙带回藿藿身边好了。
t_en: Let's bring this one back.

t_ch: 藿藿，对不起。就当爸爸妈妈已经不在了……
t_en: Huohuo, I'm sorry. It's better that you pretend mom and dad are no longer here...

t_ch: 即便是亲生父母，也能这么绝情吗。人类啊……
t_en: How can your own flesh and blood be so heartless? These humans...

t_ch: 凭什么藿藿要受到那么多关注啊！我才是最应该被关注的人！我要孤立她！
t_en: Why does Huohuo get so much attention!? Hmph, I'm gonna get everyone to ignore her...

t_ch: 真是搞不懂臭小鬼的表现欲。
t_en: The behavior of these brats is astounding.

t_ch: 这尾巴也太吓人了吧！像个火把一样发亮，好恶心啊。
t_en: This tail is just so creepy! It glows like some sort of torch, gross!

t_ch: 老子给你来上一口！
t_en: Hey! Wanna lose a hand!?

t_ch: 尽管知道这不过是岁阳的幻影，母亲离开后，藿藿还是感觉到呼吸变得更加沉重了。
t_en: Even though she knows this is just a mirage made by the heliobus, Huohuo's breathing still gets heavier after her mother leaves.

t_ch: 尽管知道这也是岁阳的幻影，同学们离开后，藿藿再次陷入到失落的情绪里。
t_en: Even though she knows this is just a mirage made by the heliobus, Huohuo still feels depressed after her classmates leave.

t_ch: 现在附身的话，应该是出不去的。
t_en: You probably won't be able to leave right now if you're possessed.

t_ch: 也许应该将剩下的人一起带回藿藿身边。
t_en: Maybe you should take the rest of the people back to Huohuo.

t_ch: 似乎尾巴无法与机关互动，也许应该找个附身后的人来启动机关。
t_en: Tail doesn't seem capable of interacting with mechanisms. Maybe we should find someone who's possessed to trigger them.

t_ch: 尾巴附身于两人，试图将他们一起带回藿藿身边。
t_en: Tail possesses the two and tries to bring them back to Huohuo together.

t_ch: 尾巴感受到这扇门只是幻障迷境的虚构，门后什么也没有。
t_en: Tail senses that this door is just an imaginary structure in the Illusory Maze with nothing behind the door.

t_ch: 尾巴附身到藿藿的母亲身上，试图将她带回藿藿身边。
t_en: Tail possesses Huohuo's mother and tries to bring her back to Huohuo.

t_ch: 尾巴附身到恶意的同学身上，试图将他带回藿藿身边。
t_en: Tail possesses the mean classmate and tries to bring him back to Huohuo.

t_ch: 尾巴将藿藿的母亲带到了藿藿身边
t_en: Tail takes Huohuo's mother back to her.

t_ch: 投子认负吧，你已经输了。
t_en: Accept your defeat, you are bested.

t_ch: 按照惯例，在群里同步下情报吧。
t_en: Let's sync up our intel as per usual.

t_ch: 尾巴仿佛听到了有一只恶魔低语「尾巴，绝对不可以穿过去。不要穿过去」。
t_en: Tail felt like he could hear the murmurs of a devil, "Tail, you must not go through there. Do not go through there."

t_ch: 门的那一边究竟是什么呢？尾巴没有做好「等价交换」的准备，他不打算过去。
t_en: Just what lies on the other side of that door? Tail is not prepared for an "equivalent exchange," nor does he plan on going through.

t_ch: 召集捉鬼小队
t_en: Call the ghost-hunting squad

t_ch: 镇妖塔内封印新的岁阳也许能够获得全新的驱邪术，这对各位大人降妖除魔必有所助益。既然我已经完成藿藿大人的交待，在下就告辞了。
t_en: New exorcismics might be obtained when new heliobi become sealed in the suppression towers, which will greatly aid you in suppressing demons. Now that I'm done conveying Judge Huohuo's message, I shall take my leave.

t_ch: 守灵注意到大人一直在使用十王司法器「藏月瓠」，但却不知道「藏月瓠」的正确用法。守灵受藿藿大人所托，请允许在下小小示范一下。
t_en: Shouling has noticed that you have been using the sacred Lunaumbra Gourd vessel from the Ten-Lords Commission, yet do not use it in the correct manner. Shouling has been instructed by Judge Huohuo to perform a minor demonstration, if permissible.

t_ch: 挑战降妖辑录
t_en: Challenge Exorcismal Chronicle

t_ch: 与镇妖塔中岁阳对话…
t_en: Speak with the heliobus in the suppression tower...

t_ch: 镇妖塔——绥园中「束形却邪阵」的一部分，用来镇伏岁阳的收容装置。
t_en: The Suppression Tower — part of Fyxestroll Garden's "Evil Binding Matrix" — is a containment receptacle used to restrain heliobi.

t_ch: 挑战斩邪除恶
t_en: Challenge "Begone, Evil"

t_ch: 呜…输掉棋局的人要丢掉灵魂，这是一场、一场…黑暗决斗！
t_en: Waa... The loser of this chess game loses their soul! This is some kind... some kind of duel of darkness!

t_ch: 还以为你要说什么呢…各位怎么看呢？
t_en: I thought you were going to say something... What do you all make of this situation?

t_ch: 很神秘。
t_en: It's very mysterious.

t_ch: 很神秘。
t_en: It's very mysterious.

t_ch: 很神秘。
t_en: It's very mysterious.

t_ch: 很神秘。
t_en: It's very mysterious.

t_ch: 聊天效率真是太高啦！
t_en: Well, we reached an agreement quickly!

t_ch: 啊…我是说这个看样子应该就是岁阳作祟。
t_en: Ah... I mean, this looks like the work of a heliobus.

t_ch: 也可能是什么街头行为艺术？
t_en: It could just be some kind of street performance?

t_ch: 岁阳难道不会躲起来吓人吗…在街头摆残局到底是什么目的啊？
t_en: I thought heliobi were supposed to hide and scare people from the shadows... What would one be doing causing chaos on the streets?

t_ch: 岁阳这种东西嘛，往往都是很执拗的，没办法用人类的思维方式去衡量。
t_en: Heliobi are stubborn creatures, we can't use human logic to judge their intentions.

t_ch: 既然是岁阳，那我去看看吧。
t_en: If it's a heliobus, I should go and check it out.

t_ch: 我亲自去下一局棋就知道了。
t_en: If I go and play some chess, then we'll find out.

t_ch: 这件事就麻烦{NICKNAME}你了，遇到什么危险，请及时联系我，或者是寒鸦大人。
t_en: We're counting on you, {NICKNAME}. If you run into any danger, contact me or Hanya right away.

t_ch: 我和小桂子去查另外一条线索了，等你的好消息！
t_en: Little Gui and I will go and check out another lead, we'll wait for your good news!

t_ch: 解散，现在就各忙各的吧！
t_en: Alright, let's split up gang and get to our tasks!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}老师？您怎么来这里了？
t_en: {NICKNAME}? What are you doing here?

t_ch: 我还想问你呢…
t_en: I was going to ask you the same thing...

t_ch: 哎呀，你也来下棋？
t_en: Oh, are you here to play chess, too?

t_ch: 彦卿的目的应该和老师一样，都是来制伏岁阳的。
t_en: I think I'm here for the same reason you are, to subdue this heliobus.

t_ch: 将军收到了十王司的公文，而后匆匆离开了神策府…彦卿翻阅过《大敌名录》，想来这岁阳定是个不错的对手，肯定能砥砺剑术，我便来到了这里！
t_en: The General received an official letter from the Ten-Lords Commission and left the Seat of Divine Foresight in a hurry... I read the "List of Archenemies" before and figured that this heliobus must be a good opponent to sharpen my sword skills, so here I am.

t_ch: 你怎么知道哪里有岁阳？
t_en: How do you know where the heliobi are?

t_ch: 老师可知道「罗浮杂俎」？我看见有人说这里出了怪事，便来这里看看。
t_en: Do you know about "Ghostly Grove"? I heard from someone on the site that there were strange things happening here, so I came to see.

t_ch: 岁阳很弱的，做不了你的对手。
t_en: The heliobi are very weak, they are no match for you.

t_ch: 尺有所长，寸有所短。将军教我学习本事，要我不能挑剔授业老师。
t_en: We all have strengths and weaknesses. The general taught me to hone my skills and not be picky about who I take as a teacher.

t_ch: 小子，这棋你到底还下不下了？我以为你是没脑子赢我，结果竟是没胆识挑战，呵呵。
t_en: Kid, are you playing chess or not? I figured you don't have the brains to beat me, turns out you don't even have the guts to challenge me!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}老师，给您介绍一下，这位…岁阳老师？自称「棋鬼」。后面那几位好像都是刚才下棋输给她的人……
t_en: {NICKNAME}, let me introduce you, this... heliobus? She calls herself the "Chess Ghost." Those guys at the back seem to be people who just lost to her...

t_ch: 你这懦夫，不敢和棋鬼大人对弈！
t_en: Coward! You wouldn't dare challenge the Chess Ghost!

t_ch: 就是，你太逊了！
t_en: That's right, you're no match!

t_ch: 胆小鬼！
t_en: Coward!

t_ch: 这你都没被挑衅到？
t_en: You weren't the slightest bit provoked by that?

t_ch: …主要是这家伙有点可笑，很难严肃起来……
t_en: ...It's more because she's ridiculous, it's hard to take her seriously...

t_ch: 小鬼头！你太放肆了！
t_en: You wretch! How dare you be so impudent!

t_ch: 我根本分不清是谁在说话…
t_en: I can't even tell who's talking...

t_ch: 倒也没必要分清就是了……
t_en: It doesn't even matter...

t_ch: 你们别聊天了，给我棋鬼一点基本的尊重好吗？到底敢不敢跟我对弈！
t_en: Enough talking! You will show me some basic respect! Will you play chess with me or not?

t_ch: 彦卿要跟她下棋吗？
t_en: Are you going to play chess with her, Yanqing?

t_ch: 说来惭愧…这个棋彦卿不会啊。
t_en: It's embarrassing to admit but... I don't know how to play this type of chess.

t_ch: 平素里和将军下的都是仙舟星阵棋——但棋鬼的这个「棋」，彦卿没怎么见过……
t_en: Normally I play Xianzhou starchess with the general... but the Chess Ghosts's "chess" is alien to me...

t_ch: 这是棋？这是什么棋？
t_en: This is chess? What kind of chess is this?

t_ch: 切，没见识的东西！这玩意儿叫「寻径指津」，是起源于你们罗浮太卜司的益智游戏。
t_en: Tsk, uneducated swine! This is called the "Pathfinder." It is a puzzle game that originates from the Luofu Divination Commission.

t_ch: 「寻径指津」的出题与解题，乃是一种穷尽才智的对弈。你们能否解开我的谜题呢？
t_en: Responding to "Pathfinder" questions is a type of chess match that will exhaust your mental strength. Can you answer my riddles?

t_ch: 到底是下棋还是解谜？
t_en: Wait, are we playing chess or doing riddles now?

t_ch: 哦，原来这是解谜…是我搞错了…难道我其实是「谜鬼」？
t_en: Oh, it's actually answering riddles... My mistake... Does this make me the "Riddle Ghost"?

t_ch: …这不都一样吗！有什么区别吗！不都是智商的博弈、头脑的对决吗！
t_en: ...Isn't that all the same? What is the difference? They're all games of intelligence and battles of wit!

t_ch: 怎么，老师要陪她玩一局吗？
t_en: Well, do you want to play a round with her?

t_ch: 看起来只能这样了。
t_en: Looks like we have no choice.

t_ch: 那我陪你下一局吧。
t_en: I'll play with you, then!

t_ch: 呵，这个化外民倒是还有点胆识…不像你，明明是个仙舟剑客，却那么畏首畏尾！
t_en: Hah! This outworlder has some guts... Unlike you... You're clearly a Xianzhou swordsman and yet you run off with your tail between your legs!

t_ch: 随你怎么说吧，彦卿是来拿岁阳归案的，又不是来陪你玩小游戏的。
t_en: Whatever you say. I came to bring a heliobus to justice, not to play silly games.

t_ch: 老师就算是输了，变成手下败将的样子，彦卿会用手中的剑将老师救出来的～
t_en: Even if you lose and end up like those she's defeated, I'll use my sword to rescue you.

t_ch: 野蛮！这是头脑的对决，用剑像话吗！
t_en: You barbarian! This is a battle of minds, you think using a sword is fair?

t_ch: 来吧，化外民{M#小兄弟}{F#小丫头}，来一场酣畅淋漓的对弈吧！你准备好了吗？
t_en: Bring it on, outworlder, let's have a hearty game of chess! Are you ready?

t_ch: 来吧。
t_en: Bring it on.

t_ch: 好胆识！
t_en: I like your courage!

t_ch: 稍等一下。
t_en: Just a minute.

t_ch: 你们俩怎么这么磨叽！搞快点！
t_en: What's taking you both so long? Hurry up already!

t_ch: 来吧，化外民{M#小兄弟}{F#小丫头}，来一场酣畅淋漓的对弈吧！你准备好了吗？
t_en: Bring it on, outworlder, let's have a hearty game of chess! Are you ready?

t_ch: 来吧。
t_en: Bring it on.

t_ch: 好胆识！
t_en: I like your courage!

t_ch: 稍等一下。
t_en: Just a minute.

t_ch: 你们俩怎么这么磨叽！搞快点！
t_en: What's taking you both so long? Hurry up already!

t_ch: 可恶啊！我倾尽才智创制出的谜题，竟被你这样的宵小之辈轻易解开了！可恶啊！
t_en: Darn it! I used all of my talents to create these riddles and you saw through them easily! Damnation!

t_ch: 怎么还急眼了？
t_en: Aren't you a sore loser?

t_ch: 倾尽才智就这？
t_en: You used all your intelligence just for that?

t_ch: 相信我，这真的很难！
t_en: Trust me, that was really hard!

t_ch: 住口住口住口住口！可恶啊！我要！让你们！付出代价！
t_en: Shut it, shut it, shut your mouth! Damnation! I WILL make you PAY!

t_ch: 就像我身后那三个宵小之辈一样让我丢尽颜面，你们必须付出代价！
t_en: You shall pay the price just as these three that humiliated me before you did!

t_ch: 彦卿还以为那三个人都是下棋输了呢…原来这个棋鬼只是输不起……
t_en: I thought those three lost to you... Turns out this Chess Ghost is just a sore loser...

t_ch: 我确实没赢过他们，但这就是他们嘲笑我「人菜瘾大」的理由吗？
t_en: I may not have beaten them, but does that give them reason to mock my abilities and call me an "amateur"?

t_ch: 这三个人就是有棋品没人品的典型！我最看不起这样的人！你们俩也赶紧受死吧！
t_en: These three are the definition of minds over manners! Such people disgust me! You two will die alongside them!

t_ch: 益智游戏彦卿不擅长，但要打架我可就不困了…来吧，棋鬼老师，请容彦卿向您讨教一二。
t_en: I am no good in these games of wit, but if you want to fight, that suits me perfectly... Come, Chess Ghost, allow me to teach you a thing or two!

t_ch: 小心别伤到被附身的人。
t_en: Be careful not to hurt anyone else!

t_ch: 不必担心，彦卿有分寸。
t_en: Don't worry, I got this.

t_ch: 归根到底，还是要战斗啊…
t_en: So after all that, it still ends in a fight...

t_ch: 可恶啊！你们这些有棋品没人品的家伙，就算再擅长解开谜题又有何用！给我记住啊！
t_en: Damnation! People like you with minds but no manners... What use is solving riddles anyway? You remember this!

t_ch: 这岁阳的战斗方式颇为特别，不过如此水平实在让彦卿提不起兴致，看来「岁阳之乱」已经是过去了啊。
t_en: This heliobus's fighting style is quite unique, but too low-level to entertain me. It seems the "Heliobi Wars" are finished.

t_ch: 这家伙在岁阳之中也是杂兵。
t_en: This heliobus is just a pawn in their ranks.

t_ch: 有道理，岁阳之中肯定还有着其他高手。
t_en: True, there must be masters among their ranks.

t_ch: 我怀疑是因为我们太强了。
t_en: I suspect we are just too overpowered.

t_ch: 也有一定可能性，确实彦卿和老师实力非同小可，不是一般岁阳能碰瓷的。
t_en: That is possible. Our power together is indeed considerable. No regular heliobus could pull one over on us.

t_ch: 眼下不能放着这些被夺舍之人不管，彦卿便陪着他们去医馆了～咱们之后再见～
t_en: Now, we cannot leave these victims unattended, I shall escort them to the apothecary~ May we meet again~

t_en: We can't let Wenyuan wither away. Arrest the heliobus.

t_ch: 判官果然应该这样，雪衣前辈也会这样做。
t_en: That's what a Judge should do. That's what Xueyi sensei would do.

t_ch: 先放过岁阳吧，这样做最好…
t_en: Let the heliobus go for now. It's for the best...

t_ch: 尊重他们的选择吗……
t_en: Do you respect their choice...?

t_ch: 我知道代价是什么，我早就知道，就这样吧。
t_en: I know the price I'll pay. I knew it all along. So be it.

t_ch: 为什么…为什么不能放过我们……
t_en: Why... why can't you just let us go...

t_ch: 人类，连自己族类的情感都无法理解和同情吗？还是你太过年轻，没能体会过挂念另一个人的滋味呢……
t_en: Humans: Are you really incapable of understanding and sympathizing with the feelings of your very own kind? Or are you so young to have never experienced the feeling of missing absent friends...

t_ch: 不行，你们不可以这样做！我不会让你将我们二人分开！
t_en: No, you cannot do this! I won't let you separate us!

t_ch: 我们要按十王司的规矩办事…请、请你谅解！
t_en: We are acting according to the rules of the Ten-Lords Commission... P—Please can you understand!

t_ch: 文远…如果你所期望的是与我远走高飞，我会帮你实现的，我不会让任何人阻碍我们，就算是十王司也不行！
t_en: Wenyuan... If what you want is to escape with me to somewhere far away, then I can help you do that. I won't let anyone get in our way — not even the Ten Lords!

t_ch: 若昔，你……
t_en: Ruoxi, you...

t_ch: 文远，我能感受到你那源源不断的情绪与力量，放心，我会尽我的全力……
t_en: Wenyuan, I can feel your infinite capacity for emotion and strength. Don't worry. I will do everything I can...

t_ch: 对不起，文远…我没办法陪你了。
t_en: I'm sorry, Wenyuan... I can't go with you any more.

t_ch: 若昔…若昔…你把若昔还给我，求你了，你要什么都可以，命也可以…把若昔还给我，求你，还给我……
t_en: Ruoxi... Ruoxi... Give her back to me. I beg you, please. I'll give you anything, even my life... Give Ruoxi back to me, I beg you. Please give her back...

t_ch: 对不起，这是十王司的规矩。
t_en: I'm sorry. These are the rules of the Ten-Lords Commission.

t_ch: 它真的会害死你的…
t_en: It will really kill you...

t_ch: 我知道，我明白…但是求求你，别带她走，别带她走……
t_en: I know. I understand... But I'm begging you, please don't take her away. Don't take her away...

t_ch: 你要去十王司吗？可以的话，你把我一起带走吧？把我也带去吧…求你了，求你了……
t_en: Are you going to the Ten-Lords Commission? If so, take me with you. Take me with you... I beg you, please...

t_ch: 走吧，我们回去把它带到镇妖塔里吧。
t_en: Let's go back and put it inside the Suppression Tower.

t_ch: 求你别带她走…把若昔还给我…若昔……
t_en: I'm begging you, please don't take her... please give Ruoxi back to me... Ruoxi...

t_ch: 藿藿怎么了吗？你们收回了岁阳，却好像有些失落。
t_en: Huohuo, what's wrong? You've recaptured a heliobus but still seem frustrated about something?

t_ch: 我大概明白了。别担心，你们对这件事的处置毫无问题。
t_en: I think I get it. Don't worry. There's nothing wrong with how you're doing things.

t_ch: 但事情就是这样，有时候即使我们把一切都做对了，结果依然可能令人不快…这就是十王司的工作，也是判官的职责。
t_en: But here's the thing: Sometimes even when we get everything right, the results can still leave us feeling unhappy... That's the job of the Ten-Lords Commission. That's the job of a Judge.

t_ch: 我、我明白了。可是，我想我们还能做些什么……
t_en: I—I understand. But I think there's still more we can do...

t_ch: 如果你要去见这位文远的话，把这个带给他吧。虽然狐人不至陷入魔阴身，但如果服下这药，他会好受很多。
t_en: If you're going to see this Wenyuan, then take this to him. Foxians might not immediately reach the stage of being mara-struck, but this will still help him feel better if he uses it.

t_ch: 你们没做错任何事。只是「正确」就是这么难以接受罢了。
t_en: You didn't do anything wrong. It's just that what's "right" is very hard to accept.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我们走吧……
t_en: {NICKNAME}, let's go...

t_ch: 即使一切都做对了，结果依然可能令人不快…这就是十王司的工作。
t_en: Despite getting everything right, the results can still leave us feeling unhappy... That's the job of the Ten-Lords Commission. That's the job of a Judge.

t_ch: 若昔…唉……
t_en: Ruoxi... Sigh...

t_ch: 我记得你，你们是十王司的人！为什么还来找我？
t_en: I remember you. You're from the Ten-Lords Commission! Why have you come back here?

t_ch: 我想帮助你。
t_en: I want to help you.

t_ch: 免了吧…难道你帮我帮得还不够多吗？
t_en: Save it... haven't you already helped me enough?

t_ch: 我想向你道歉。
t_en: I want to apologize to you.

t_ch: 道歉？何必呢，你们做的事都是正确的。对你们来说，这最重要，不是吗？
t_en: Apologize? What for, you're just doing what's right. That's all you care about, isn't it?

t_ch: 服下这药会好受很多…
t_en: Take this medicine here and you will feel much better...

t_ch: 这是…「万寿无情丹」？
t_en: Is this... Longevity Pill of Cruelty?

t_ch: 不必了。我已经得而复失过一次了，但我勉强撑住了…可若是连失去她这份痛苦，都要被夺走的话，我恐怕真的会崩溃吧。
t_en: No thanks. I lost what I'd barely regained, but still managed to hold onto things... Now if even the very pain of losing her is taken away from me, I'm afraid I really would break down.

t_ch: 现在我承受着这份痛苦，就还能感到她、记住她…这样一来，她就始终在我的身边，没能离去。
t_en: I bear this pain now, and I can still feel her and remember her... It's how she can always be with me, and never leave me.

t_ch: {M#小伙子}{F#小姑娘}，我不怪你，也不恨你，因为你没做错任何事。我只是，不太想和你说话。
t_en: {M#Boy}{F#Girl}, I blame you not, nor do I hate you. Because you didn't do anything wrong. It's just, I don't really want to talk to you.

t_ch: 如果没有其他事的话，你走吧。
t_en: If there's nothing else, please go.

t_ch: 如果没有其他事的话，你走吧。
t_en: If there's nothing else, please go.

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}，无论如何，我们做出了我们的选择，现在不应该是后悔的时候。
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}, no matter what, we have made our choice. Now is not the time for regret.

t_ch: 记得桂乃芬要我们帮忙发布「罗浮杂俎」吗，就拜托你了……
t_en: Remember Guinaifen asked us to post up to the Ghostly Grove? Could you please do that...

t_ch: 我能理解文远先生的感受，接受「离开」并不容易，我也一样。
t_en: I can understand Mr. Wenyuan's sentiments. It's hard to accept someone leaving; I'm the same.

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}今天也辛苦了，我、我先回去了。再见……
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}, you did a great job today. I—I'm heading off then. Goodbye...

t_ch: 谢谢你们，我知道你们有十王司的使命，我由衷感激你们的决定。
t_en: Thank you. I know you have your orders from the Ten-Lords Commission. I sincerely appreciate your decision.

t_ch: 接下来无论发生什么事，都是我自己的决定，与你无关…你不必承担任何指责和愧疚。
t_en: Now whatever happens next is going to be my own decision, and has nothing to do with you... You don't have to bear any guilt or shame about this.

t_ch: 文远…这样真的好吗？你…你真的要放弃这么多吗？
t_en: Wenyuan... Is this really for the best? You... do you really want to give up so much?

t_ch: 为了等你回来，我已经苦苦支撑了三十年。也许要不了多久，又可能需要很久很久，我才能等来最终的解脱。
t_en: I've already spent thirty long hard years waiting for you to come back. Maybe it'll be quick, or maybe it'll take forever before I can finally find relief.

t_ch: 但你现在…回来了，重新回到了我的身边。哪怕你并不是真正的她…哪怕你只是命运的一个玩笑，我也很满足了。
t_en: But now... you're back, back at my side. Even if you're not really you... even if you're just a joke of fate, I am still happy.

t_ch: 谢谢你，无论你是谁，「若昔」。
t_en: Thank you, no matter who you are, "Ruoxi."

t_ch: 我们该走了，再见了，判官小姑娘，还有你{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}。
t_en: We should get out of here. Goodbye, Miss Judge, and to you, {M#dude}{F#lady}.

t_ch: 我们…这样做，真的好吗？要不，现在回绥园和桂乃芬她们再商量一下吧……
t_en: Are we... Is this for the best? How about we go back to Fyxestroll Garden and talk things over with Guinaifen first...

t_ch: 我知道你的担忧。
t_en: I understand your concerns.

t_ch: 毕竟这不符合判官的做法…
t_en: After all, this is not in line with the Judge's decision...

t_ch: 走吧……
t_en: Let's go...

t_ch: 你向桂乃芬解释了文远的事情。
t_en: You tell Guinaifen about Wenyuan and his situation.

t_ch: 我明白了，藿藿不知道自己究竟做对了还是做错了，可世上哪有那么简单的对错呢？
t_en: I see. Huohuo doesn't know whether she was right or wrong. But when is she ever going to get a simple case of right and wrong in this world of ours?

t_ch: 总之事情算是告一段落，我们在「罗浮杂俎」上发一下吧。
t_en: Anyway, the whole thing's over and done with now. Let's post up to the Ghostly Grove, okay?

t_ch: 我能理解文远先生的感受，接受「离开」并不容易，我也一样。哎……
t_en: I can understand Mr. Wenyuan's sentiments. It's hard to accept someone leaving; I'm the same. Sigh...

t_ch: 藿藿别难过了，我请你去吃尚滋味吧。
t_en: Don't be sad, Huohuo. Let me take you out to the Spices Supreme.

t_ch: 不了不了，我们还有很多事要做呢………
t_en: No no, we still have lots to get done...

t_ch: 把藿藿交给我，把工作交给{NICKNAME}吧，素裳在的话，肯定也会同意的。
t_en: Leave Huohuo with me, and leave the work to {NICKNAME}. If Sushang were in, she'd be sure to agree with me.

t_ch: 藿藿快去吧。
t_en: Go on then, Huohuo.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}也一起吧。
t_en: Come with us, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 带上我也一起！
t_en: Take me with you!

t_ch: 走吧走吧。
t_en: Let's go, c'mon.

t_ch: 桂乃芬好好招待了情绪低落的藿藿，美食总是有治愈人心的力量。
t_en: Guinaifen takes good care of the down-in-the-dumps Huohuo. Food always has the power to cure a heavy heart.

t_ch: 至于文远和若昔两人，相信他们会给你们一个交代的。
t_en: As for Wenyuan and Ruoxi? I trust they'll give you an explanation of their own.

t_ch: 您终于找到我了…不好意思，我本想去十王司的驻地找您，但那里有不少冥差和判官，我不是很敢接近…就只好在外围等着被您发现了。
t_en: You finally found me... I'm sorry. I was going to go look for you at the Ten-Lords Commission, but there were all these spiritfarers and Judges there. I didn't really dare get close... so I just stuck around outside, waiting to be noticed by you.

t_ch: 我想您也听说了…文远已经不在了。那么依照我们之前的承诺，我来见您。
t_en: I think you must have heard... Wenyuan is no longer with us. So in light of our promise, I have come to see you.

t_ch: 我以为你会跑掉。
t_en: I thought you'd run off.

t_ch: 怎么会呢？您愿意放过我们，我又怎么敢出尔反尔、恩将仇报呢？
t_en: How could I? How could I go back on my word like that and bite the hand that feeds, after you'd been willing to let me go?

t_ch: 谢谢你信守承诺。
t_en: Thank you for keeping your word.

t_ch: 请不要这样说，我受之有愧。这只是我的本分，不值得您感谢。
t_en: Don't say that. I don't deserve it. It's just my job, and doesn't deserve your thanks.

t_ch: 其实不瞒您说，岁阳天性自由，我也的确想过要逃走。但我改变了想法，我想留在这里。
t_en: If I'm honest with you, heliobi have a free nature, and I've thought about running off before. But I've changed my mind, and I want to stay here.

t_ch: 因为文远我体会到了爱与被爱的情感…它既有甘甜，又混杂着一丝苦涩和酸楚。像是酝酿了许多年的酒，这就是经过等待和痛苦考验的爱吗？
t_en: Because of Wenyuan, I've got to experience the feeling of love, and being loved... It's both sweet, but also mixed with a hint of bitter and sour. Like wine that's steeped for years and years, is this how it feels to love after so much pain and waiting?

t_ch: …我从未在别的人类身上品尝过如此复杂的情绪。在失去他之后，其他人的情感在我看来太过寡淡，我…一时间居然失去了身为岁阳的感触，堕入了名为「人」的幻觉里。
t_en: ...I've never experienced such complex emotions in any other human before. After losing him, other people's emotions just seem too bland to me. I... I lost all feeling of being a heliobus for a moment, and fell into this illusion called "being human."

t_ch: 将我送回十王司的囚笼中吧，麻烦您了。
t_en: Please, send me back to the Ten Lords' prison. Please.

t_ch: （收入「藏月瓠」）
t_en: (Pull them inside the Lunaumbra Gourd)

t_ch: 谢谢您成全我们。
t_en: Thank you for helping us.

t_ch: 走吧，我们回去把它带到镇妖塔里吧。
t_en: Let's go back and put it inside the Suppression Tower.

t_ch: 文远先生和这位「若昔」小姐想必已经度过了美好的时光……
t_en: Mr. Wenyuan and this "Ruoxi" must have spent a wonderful time with each other...

t_ch: 如此捉鬼流程不符合十王司的规范，请你就把它当成你和我之间的秘密吧。
t_en: This ghost-hunting mission does not comply with the rules of the Ten Lords. Please keep this a secret just between you and me.

t_ch: 谢谢你{NICKNAME}，我们之后再见……
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. We'll see you next time...

t_ch: 文远小步快走地带着若昔离开了，也许他担忧判官突然反悔，无法再像刚才那般心软。
t_en: Wenyuan hurriedly left with Ruoxi. Perhaps he was worried that the Judge might suddenly change her mind and wouldn't be as lenient as before.

t_ch: 若昔，我好想你…
t_en: Ruoxi, I miss you so much...

t_ch: 我已经无法忍受了…
t_en: I can't take it any longer...

t_ch: 你向寒鸦解释了文远的事情。
t_en: You explain to Hanya about Wenyuan and his situation.

t_ch: 这很不对劲…
t_en: Something is very strange about this...

t_ch: 最近太卜司怪事很多！
t_en: There's been lots of strange things going on in the Divination Commission lately!

t_ch: 不要贸然靠近她。
t_en: Don't approach her carelessly.

t_ch: 听说你要辞职了？
t_en: I heard you were quitting?

t_ch: 没错，我找到了人生目标
t_en: That's right, I've found my goal in life.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，准备好的话藿藿就要摇动同心火铃咯？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, if you are ready, Huohuo will ring the Harmonic Chime?

t_ch: 这队伍要排到什么时候？
t_en: How long do we have to queue for?

t_ch: 先预约取号！
t_en: Make your booking and take a number!

t_ch: 出现了！金色传说！
t_en: There it is! The Golden Legend!

t_ch: 跃迁1次
t_en: Make 1 Warp

t_ch: 跃迁<unbreak>10</unbreak>次
t_en: Make <unbreak>10</unbreak> Warps

t_ch: 这里是？地衡司的办公室？
t_en: What is this place? An office of the Realm-Keeping Commission?

t_ch: 不，这儿只是青雀小姐内心的幻象…
t_en: No, this is the illusion inside Miss Qingque's mind...

t_ch: 懒散久了，突然有了雄心壮志想狠狠拼搏一把，这很奇怪吗？
t_en: Is it really that strange for someone to have a strong burst of ambition after being lazy for a long time?

t_ch: 这非常奇怪！
t_en: It's extremely strange!
Huh!?

t_ch: 这也不奇怪啊？
t_en: You don't think so?

t_ch: 对啊，我也会间歇性突发想要奋斗一下的症状。
t_en: You're right, I have times when I suddenly feel inspired to work really hard, too.

t_ch: 对小桂子这样在外闯荡的异乡人来说，想要搏一把，租屋变豪宅、星槎换巨舰，这是常事。毕竟你们青春有限，生存压力也很大。
t_en: It's common for outworlders like you, Little Gui, to want to work hard and upgrade your flat for a mansion or your starskiff for a giant ship. After all, your youth is limited and the pressure to survive is great.

t_ch: 但对咱们这样的长寿社会…事情就不一样了，大部分人就想求个安稳。
t_en: But for a long-life society like ours... Things are different. The majority of people only seek a secure life.

t_ch: 不过嘛，人的念头千奇百怪，谁说得准呢。
t_en: But, people think in all kinds of wonderful ways, who can really say for sure?

t_ch: 尾巴大爷怎么看呢？
t_en: What do you think, Mr. Tail?

t_ch: 嘿嘿，一切不合常理的事情都是因为看不见的妖魔鬼怪作祟，这是原始人的思考方式。
t_en: Hehe, the idea that anything that does not align with common logic must be the work of some unseen ghost is a very primitive way of thinking.

t_ch: 不过，如果一个人啥都没干，却突然性情大变，确实有可能是咱岁阳干的。
t_en: However, if someone's personality undergoes a dramatic change without them doing anything, that could indeed be the work of a heliobus.

t_ch: …你这不等于什么都没说嘛？
t_en: ...That really doesn't help us at all.

t_ch: 本大爷又不是渔公案的主角，没去过现场还能给你下个结论不成？
t_en: I'm not the person at the center of the Angler Mystery, how can I give an answer if I've not been to the scene personally?

t_ch: 虽然发帖人并没有明说自己来自哪个司部，不过看名称，毫无疑问是太卜司吧？
t_en: Even though the person that posted this didn't say what department they were from, judging by the name, there's no doubt that they're from the Divination Commission, right?

t_ch: …这真的是岁阳的原因吗？
t_en: ...Is it really a heliobus causing this?

t_ch: 保险起见，{NICKNAME}，咱们还是一起去现场看看吧？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, why don't we go and take a look together, to be on the safe side?

t_ch: 没问题，咱们走！
t_en: Okay, let's go!

t_ch: 让我先处理些手头的杂活…
t_en: I've just got some things to deal with first...

t_ch: 好的，藿藿会在太卜司里一边联系发帖人，一边等你。
t_en: Okay, I'll contact the person who made the post at the Divination Commission and wait for you there.

t_ch: 啊，竟然还是你们几位，真是够辛苦的。不过，去「罗浮杂俎」上发帖求助果然有效。
t_en: Ah, it's you! You really do work hard. I see posting on the "Ghostly Grove" page really gets things done, though!

t_ch: 怎么又是你？
t_en: You again?

t_ch: 太卜司最近是多事之秋，自——
t_en: There has been a lot of trouble in the Divination Commission lately, ever since—

t_ch: 符玄突然将声音压低到几乎听不见的地步。
t_en: Fu Xuan suddenly lowered her voice and became almost too quiet to hear.

t_ch: ——自本座被岁阳害得大大丢脸以后，咱们司部里又出现了一桩怪事。
t_en: ...Since that time the heliobi greatly damaged my reputation, another strange phenomenon has occurred in our department.

t_ch: 怎么不直接短信找我们？
t_en: Why didn't you just message us directly?

t_ch: 是啊，太卜大人，你要是怀疑太卜司里还有没清除的岁阳，可以直接联系我们呀。
t_en: That's right, master diviner. If you suspect there are still heliobi that have not been cleared out from the Divination Commission, you can just contact us directly.

t_ch: 本座到没有自信到「这个事情一定是岁阳作祟」的程度，所以发帖试探了一下……
t_en: I am not yet entirely convinced that "this is undoubtedly the work of a heliobus," so I thought I'd make the post to investigate...

t_ch: 你们既然出现，就说明这事儿确有可疑的地方了。
t_en: As you're here, that means there is indeed something suspicious about this.

t_ch: 见到你，就知道帖子说的是谁了。
t_en: Seeing you now, I know exactly who your post is referring to.

t_ch: 是啊，懂的都懂。这件事在旁人看来或许没什么奇特的地方，但在咱们司部内的人看来，当真是极为诡异。
t_en: That's right, you understand. This may not seem so strange to the average person, but everyone in our department finds this whole thing extremely abnormal.

t_ch: 呃，该怎么说呢？之前各位帮我祓除缠身的岁阳时，太卜司的卜者青雀居功甚伟。我本想感谢她，多给她一些司部内表现的机会……
t_en: Ahem, how should I explain? When you were all assisting me in driving out the lingering heliobi, our diviner Qingque made a great contribution to the efforts. I wanted to thank her and give her more opportunities to show her skills in the department...

t_ch: 但不知为何，这几天她突然转了性子，到的比谁都早，走的比谁都晚。今天我接到司里卜者的报告，她打算辞去卜者的职务，鼓励同事们和她一同创业。
t_en: But for some unknown reason, her attitude completely changed recently. She has been the first into the office and the last to leave. Today I even received notice from other diviners that she is planning to quit her role as diviner and is encouraging her colleagues to start a new business with her.

t_ch: 这太怪了！
t_en: That's so strange!

t_ch: 对吧，你肯定能立刻理解。
t_en: You see? I'm sure you understand.

t_ch: 想创业发财很怪吗？
t_en: Is it that strange to want to start a business and get rich?

t_ch: 不怪。人有七情六欲，渴望出人头地或坐拥亿万家财，这些都是常情。
t_en: It is not. People are creatures of desire, it is normal for them to crave renown and fortune.

t_ch: 但青雀这孩子，我和她聊过，她来太卜司工作求的不过是一个安稳和自在…很难想象这样的人突然之间就想尝一尝创业艰辛了。
t_en: But I have spoken with Qingque before, she only came to work for the Divination Commission for stability and comfort... It is extremely hard to imagine that a person like this would suddenly want to try starting a business.

t_ch: 勤劳的青雀，太卜不喜欢吗？
t_en: Do you not like Qingque now that she is a motivated worker?

t_ch: 勤奋或怠惰都是人的天性，我倒也没有什么偏见。但一个人突然性格大变，多半是有外因影响。
t_en: People are naturally diligent or lazy, I do not judge anyone for either. However, when someone's personality suddenly transforms, it is often because of an external influence.

t_ch: 我觉得整件事情里透着诡异。联想到自己的遭遇，所以要把你们找来瞧瞧。
t_en: I think there is something extremely eerie about this whole thing. Thinking back to my own encounter, I wanted to ask you to take a look for yourselves.

t_ch: 符玄大人，那青雀小姐眼下还在这儿吗？
t_en: Diviner Fu Xuan, is this Miss Qingque still here at the moment?

t_ch: …她正在书库那厢和同事们高谈阔论，畅想美好未来。
t_en: She's currently over by the repository, talking loudly to her colleagues and fantasizing about her bright future.

t_ch: 走吧，我猜你们也很感兴趣。
t_en: Let's go, I think you'll find this interesting, too.

t_ch: 青雀，听说你打算辞职了？
t_en: Qingque, I hear you're thinking of quitting?

t_ch: 嗯，我找到了全新的人生意义。
t_en: That's right, I've found a whole new meaning to my life.

t_ch: 你？没想到还能听到青雀谈论人生意义……
t_en: You? I never thought I'd hear Qingque talking about the meaning of life...

t_ch: 嗨哟，这是太卜司要变天了啊！
t_en: Looks like the Divination Commission is in for a big change!

t_ch: 你该不会是又被太卜贬了一顿，打算自暴自弃了吧？
t_en: You're not just letting yourself give up because the master diviner humiliated you again, are you?

t_ch: 回首过去，我的一生只有蹉跎。而今向前看，我已幡然悔悟！
t_en: Looking back on my life, I see all I have done is waste time. However, looking to my future, I regret this greatly.

t_ch: 我看到了命运的道路向我敞开怀抱！
t_en: I have seen the path of destiny opening up before me!

t_ch: 展开讲讲。
t_en: Explain.

t_ch: 这还是我认识的那个青雀吗？
t_en: Is this really the Qingque that I know?

t_ch: 你看吧，这也太不正常了。
t_en: You see? This is not normal.

t_ch: 复盘过往的体验度量，各位对「成功生活」的提炼只是衣食无忧和栖身之所，缺乏思考和沉淀，这种平淡的体验能够反哺赋能他人吗？
t_en: Looking back on past experiences, people only measure a "successful life" in terms of having clothing, food, and minimal worries. Without deeper thought, can these bland experiences serve as feedback to empower others?

t_ch: 太卜司里日复一日干上几百年，这样的「成功」底层逻辑是什么？顶层设计在哪？比起短生种的亮点在哪？优势在哪？没有！
t_en: I have worked the same day over and over in the Divination Commission for hundreds of years. Where is the logic in terms of "success"? Where is the pinnacle? Where are the highlights in our lives compared with short-life species? Where are the benefits? There are none!

t_ch: 这是对时间和人生价值的双重浪费！在宇宙的另一边，比你短寿的人在垂直领域采用复用打法达成持久收益，他们终日奋斗，远比你更努力！
t_en: This is a waste of both time and life! Across the universe, there are people with shorter lifespans than yourselves in parallel dimensions that use and reuse methods for lasting gains. They work day-in-day-out and work far harder than you ever will!

t_ch: 而你躲在小小洞天里，假装超级富豪们经手的一百亿信用点与你毫不相干！却惊讶地发现富豪们买走了你身边的一切！
t_en: Yet you hide in your little delves and pretend that the billions of credits in the hands of the super rich have nothing to do with you! Then you're shocked when you find that the rich have already bought up everything around you!

t_ch: 你是否感到热血沸腾、胸膛左侧正在隐隐作痛，它正在雷鸣般地喊出你的渴望——
t_en: Don't you feel your blood boiling? A faint pain in the left-hand side of your chest? Your desire is screaming out like thunder—

t_ch: 你感觉现场的气氛不太对劲，一阵狂热的情绪从心底涌上来了。
t_en: You sense an abnormal atmosphere around you as a wave of manic emotion bursts forth from the bottom of your heart.

t_ch: 钱！我想要更多的钱！
t_en: Money! I want more money!

t_ch: 我想要豪宅、星槎…不，我是说歼星舰！
t_en: I want a huge house and a starskiff... No, I want a starnought!

t_ch: …我、我要还清我三百年的房贷！
t_en: ...I, I want to pay off my three-hundred year mortgage!

t_ch: 给我信用点！
t_en: Give me credits!

t_ch: 不如给我星琼…
t_en: Give me Stellar Jade...

t_ch: 已经没有那种世俗的欲望了。
t_en: I no longer feel these worldly desires.

t_ch: 小了，各位，格局小了。你们以为我在和你们谈钱吗？不，不是，不只是这样！
t_en: Too small, you're all thinking too small! You think I am talking to you about money? No, it's much more than that!

t_ch: 就像路易斯•弗莱明的那句豪言一样——「我不在乎信用点，因为我就是信用本身」。
t_en: Just as Louis Fleming once said: "I do not care about credits, because I AM credit!"

t_ch: 我要和各位谈的是人生的价值与自我实现！…然后才是钱！
t_en: I am talking to you about the value of life and self-fulfillment! ...Only after these can you think about money!

t_ch: 那，青雀你打算怎么开始呢？
t_en: Then, where do you plan to start, Qingque?

t_ch: 怎么开始？就从这一步开始，我将辞去这份旱涝保收的工作，展开我的创业计划——我要让帝垣琼玉牌成为风靡银河的娱乐！然后进军其他领域……
t_en: Where will I start? From this step right here, I shall leave this safe and stable job and begin my business plan... I will make Celestial Jade popular across the galaxy! Then I shall branch out into other dimensions...

t_ch: 只要你和我一样，也拥有一颗奋斗的心，随时欢迎！各位听懂了吗？听懂掌声——
t_en: You are all welcome to follow along. All you need is to be like me and have a fighter's heart! Do you understand me? Clap if you understand—

t_ch: 人群被兴奋的浪潮淹没，人们为青雀吐出的每一个字拼命鼓掌。
t_en: The crowd was overwhelmed with a wave of exhilaration, the people applauded every word Qingque had uttered.

t_ch: 就在此时，青雀的语声突然顿止，笑容凝固在了她的脸上。
t_en: Right at this moment, Qingque's voice suddenly cut out and her face froze in a fixed smile.

t_ch: 青雀小姐……
t_en: Miss Qingque...?

t_ch: 她怎么了…
t_en: What's wrong with her...

t_ch: 喂喂，你还好吧？别吓我啊！
t_en: Hey, hey! Are you okay? You're scaring me!

t_ch: 这个女孩的脑袋里面燃烧着一股不正常的贪欲，尝起来火辣辣的。
t_en: There is an abnormal greed burning in this girl's mind, it tastes spicy.

t_ch: 她一定是遭遇了什么岁阳异常，符玄大人——
t_en: She must have been affected by some heliobus's influence, Lady Fu Xuan—

t_ch: 各位散开吧，青雀需要静养休息，请不要聚集在此处。
t_en: Everyone stand back. Qingque needs rest, please don't crowd her.

t_ch: 不会吧，她还没说完她的创业计划……
t_en: No way, she still hasn't told us her business plan...

t_ch: 都散了都散了啊！
t_en: Stand back, get out of here!

t_ch: 我们是丹鼎司派来的。
t_en: We were sent by the Alchemy Commission.

t_ch: 在符玄的帮助下，你们驱散了围观人群，将青雀转移到一处僻静的地方。
t_en: With the assistance of Fu Xuan, you dispersed the crowd of onlookers and moved Qingque to a secluded space.

t_ch: 多半是同占据我的犀焰一样，放大了内心某处的不安感。
t_en: Something must be enhancing one of her latent insecurities, like did Keralum when it possessed me.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，太卜大人，准备好的话我就要摇动同心火铃咯？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, master diviner, if you are ready, I shall ring the Harmonic Chime?

t_ch: 开始吧。
t_en: Let's begin.

t_ch: 等等，我再准备一下。
t_en: Wait, I still need to prepare.

t_ch: 太、太卜大人？{NICKNAME}？还有…藿藿小姐？你们怎么在这儿？
t_en: M—Master Diviner? {NICKNAME}? And... Miss Huohuo? What are you doing here?

t_ch: 青雀小姐，你突然睡着了！
t_en: Miss Qingque, you suddenly lost consciousness!

t_ch: 你还好吧，青雀？有没有觉得哪儿有点不对劲？头疼、恶心、做了奇怪的梦什么的？
t_en: Are you okay, Qingque? Have you been feeling out of sorts at all? Headache, nausea, strange dreams?

t_ch: 似乎有这么回事来着，我一倒头睡着了，做了个好长好长的梦。梦里我发了大财，嘿嘿。
t_en: Actually, yes. I fell asleep and had a really, really long dream. I dreamed I got super rich, hehe.

t_ch: 没事就好。对了，别再让我逮着你上班时间瞌睡了，快快去收拾书库吧。
t_en: As long as you're okay. Oh, right, don't let me catch you slacking off during work again! Go and tidy up the repository.

t_ch: 明、明白了，下不为例！
t_en: U—Understood! This won't happen again!

t_ch: 符玄拍了拍青雀脑袋，转身离开了。
t_en: Fu Xuan patted Qingque on the head, turned, and left.

t_ch: 呼，太卜走了。唉，我一定是被岁阳附身了对吧，{NICKNAME}，判官大人？
t_en: Phew, the Master Diviner's gone. Ah, I must have been possessed by a heliobus, right {NICKNAME}, Judge?

t_ch: 青雀小姐，你都记得啊？
t_en: Miss Qingque, you remember everything?

t_ch: 那当然，你都出现了…再加上我竟然梦见自己辞职创业、大发横财，这也太不正常了吧！我想我多半是不小心招上了那些会让人胡思乱想的幽魂吧……
t_en: Of course, you're all here after all... That and the fact that I dreamed about quitting my job and becoming a hugely successful entrepreneur, this is all too crazy! I imagine I must have attracted one of those spirits that makes people think wild things...

t_ch: 太卜似乎也不打算追究你…
t_en: Looks like the master diviner isn't going to press you on this...

t_ch: 嘿嘿，那是。没想到她老人家也会有看破不说破的时候。
t_en: Hehe, it does. I never had her down as the kind of person that could leave these things unsaid.

t_ch: 这也是她在回报青雀小姐之前的帮助吧。
t_en: This must be her way of repaying you for all your help before.

t_ch: 太卜在人情方面还真是老派。
t_en: The Master Diviner really is old-school when it comes to repaying favors.

t_ch: 所以你真不考虑创个业吗？
t_en: So, aren't you really planning on starting your own business?

t_ch: 哈？你不要吓我，我哪儿有这个精力和胆子来着。
t_en: What? Don't be crazy! As if I have the energy or the guts for that!

t_ch: 但岁阳不会无端给人类灌入不存在的念头。青雀小姐你真的没有这样的想法吗？
t_en: But a heliobus cannot implant an idea in a human that does not already exist. Have you really never thought about this before, Miss Qingque?

t_ch: 呃，有时候…当然会有！但也只是一瞬间的事情。向全宇宙证明自己的野心，这样的念头，谁能没有嘛？
t_en: Ugh well... sometimes, of course! But it's only ever just a fleeting thought. Being able to prove your ambition to the entire universe, who wouldn't want that?

t_ch: 接下来，{NICKNAME}，咱们也该把岁阳收回法阵里去了。
t_en: Okay, {NICKNAME}, let's get this heliobus back to the matrix.

t_ch: 真是辛苦两位，改日请两位去金人巷里大吃一顿，要来喔！
t_en: Thank you both so much. Please allow me to treat you to a meal at Aurum Alley some day!

t_ch: 改日不如撞日！
t_en: Why not seize the moment now!

t_ch: 今天怕是不成了。下次见，青雀小姐。
t_en: I'm afraid I can't do today. I'll see you another time, Miss Qingque.

t_ch: 好，下次一定！
t_en: Okay, next time for sure!

t_ch: 先走一步，青雀小姐。
t_en: I'll be off now, Miss Qingque.

t_ch: 没想到太卜司里还有岁阳…这一次似乎是只擅长鼓动人贪欲，诱人挖空心思发财的家伙。
t_en: I never thought that there would still be heliobi in the Divination Commission... It seems this one excelled in enhancing people's desires and seducing them to work hard for riches.

t_ch: 还不是沾染你们人类的欲望？这次多亏了{NICKNAME}和太卜，事情算是顺利解决了。
t_en: So, it would infect people with your human desires? Well, at least this has been dealt with smoothly by you two. Thanks a bunch {NICKNAME}, master diviner.

t_ch: 别忘了，我们还得将这件事影响减至最小，要在「罗浮杂俎」发布新的帖子。
t_en: Don't forget, we have to minimize the impact of this incident, it would be best to put a new post on "Ghostly Grove."

t_ch: 交给我吧。
t_en: Leave it to me.

t_ch: 岁阳还真是千奇百怪，各式各样啊…不知道那快速发财的办法到底行不行的通呢？
t_en: Heliobi really are curious creatures, they come in so many forms... I wonder if that "get-rich-quick scheme" would have actually worked?

t_ch: 你相信那些岁阳，不如相信我是燧皇。
t_en: If those heliobi are worth trusting, then I'm the Flint Emperor!

t_ch: 哎，我们先回去了，{NICKNAME}，之后再见！
t_en: Alright, we'll be heading back now, {NICKNAME}. See you soon!

t_ch: 站住，请问是来面试的还是商务合作的？
t_en: Hold it, may I ask if you are here for an interview or a business proposition?

t_ch: 我是来见青雀的！
t_en: I'm here to see Qingque!

t_ch: 青雀？你是说青总吧？
t_en: Qingque? You mean President Qing?

t_ch: 青总？这家伙在幻觉里是这么看待自己的吗？
t_en: President Qing? Is that how she sees herself in her fantasy?

t_ch: 我是来踢馆的！
t_en: I'm here for a fight!

t_ch: 抛弃无效沟通，直入主题，真不错。藿藿，好好学着点。
t_en: Abandoning useless communication and getting straight to the point, alright. Huohuo, you could learn a thing or two.

t_ch: 跟附在那小姑娘身上的岁阳说，让它快快滚出来！
t_en: You tell that heliobus squirming within that little girl to get itself out here right now!

t_ch: 挑事儿是吧？这儿是罗浮帝玉集团名下的产业！可不是什么让你随便挑战的拳馆。
t_en: You're here to cause trouble, aren't you? This enterprise is property of the Luofu Dynasty Corp! This is not some boxing gym you can just come and pick fights in!

t_ch: 大爷我可不惯着你们！让你们见识见识罗浮仙舟女子防身术长乐天赛区第一名的实力！
t_en: I will not tolerate troublemakers! I will show you the strength of the Xianzhou Luofu Exalting Sanctum's women's self defense champion!

t_ch: 来一局帝垣琼玉吧？
t_en: How about a game of Celestial Jade?

t_ch: 我正上着班呢？看看气氛好吗？
t_en: I'm working! Read the room.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}你到底在说什么啊…现在哪是干这个的时候。
t_en: What are you talking about, {NICKNAME}... How is this the time for Celestial Jade?

t_ch: 你好，我们认识青雀小姐！我们是她的好朋友！
t_en: Hello, we know Miss Qingque! We are her close friends!

t_ch: 没错，我是她的上司，速速让她从这场大发横财的春秋大梦里出来见我！
t_en: That's right, I am her boss. Tell her to depart from this delusion of fortune and come out to greet me!

t_ch: 认识青总？罗浮上下还有谁不认识青总的吗？至于好朋友…我相信像青总这样的名人一定有许多她自己也不知道的「好朋友」。
t_en: You know President Qing? Who on the Luofu doesn't? As for being her close friends... I am certain that a famous person like President Qing has many "close friends" that even she isn't aware of.

t_ch: 还有你这小矮子，竟然敢自称「青总的上司」，哈哈哈哈，真是笑掉大牙了。
t_en: And you there. Yes, you, the dwarf. You dare call yourself "President Qing's boss"? Hahaha, that is a good one!

t_ch: 你说什么？！气、气死我也！
t_en: Wh—What did you say? Wh—Why you little... feckless... I'm so mad right now!

t_ch: 你难道不知道青总她老人家一手创立了罗浮帝玉集团，让帝垣琼玉成为风靡银河的游戏。人家才是这儿至高无上的话事人，日理万机，哪能让你说见就见？
t_en: Surely you are aware that President Qing single-handedly founded the Luofu Dynasty Corp and spread the name of "Celestial Jade" all across the galaxy? She is the highest authority around here and has a million things to deal with. You think you can just ask to see her like that?
